parameters.query: SELECT job_key, status FROM jobs WHERE job_key = '{{ $json.job_key }}' LIMIT 1;
SELECT application_id, draft_status, approval_status, submitted_at FROM applications WHERE job_key = '{{ $json.job_key }}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO applications (application_id, job_key, profile_id, draft_status, approval_status)
VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), '{{ $json.job_key }}', '{{ $json.profile_id }}', 'not_started', 'pending');
